info.name: Welldomain API
info.description: Postman collection for the current Welldomain backend. Base URL defaults to http://localhost:8000. Auth flow: register -> verify email -> login -> use {{access_token}}.

}

request.description: Returns onboarding assessment questions paginated as 5 questions per page.
Returns the 90-day reassessment eligibility for the authenticated user.
